title: teratophyllum luzonicum
intro: Teratophyllum luzonicum, also known as the Philippine fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The medicinal properties of Teratophyllum luzonicum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Teratophyllum luzonicum is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in herbal capsules or tinctures.
